title: Syncing Tasks Across Multiple Boards
excerpt: I have set up automatons where board items will show up on other’s direct board items (to do lists) if they are selected as an owner or support person.  However, it doesn’t seem that this truly “syncs” the item.  If note…

posts.author: Crystal35 (Crystal)
posts.cookedHtml: I have set up automatons where board items will show up on other’s direct board items (to do lists) if they are selected as an owner or support person. However, it doesn’t seem that this truly “syncs” the item. If notes are made or the item is deleted or changed to complete, etc it only changes on the one board. Is there a way to make the items automatically sync across all boards?

posts.author: PedroM (Pedro Malaga - monday.com Certified Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Crystal35,

You should use the link and mirror columns to synchronize boards. You can take a look to this article:

Support

The Connect Boards Column

5 min read Feature     The Connect Boards Column allows you to easily link a column to the items of another board - or multiple boards! This column is a great way to connect information betwe...
